patterns.name: Hero Section
patterns.description: Full-width hero with background image, heading, subtitle, CTAs, and optional email form
patterns.usage: Landing page top section, product introductions, conversion-focused entry points
patterns.template:
Build better products

The design system for modern teams

patterns.name: Feature Section
patterns.description: Two-column layout with text and image, supports reverse order
patterns.usage: Feature highlights, product walkthroughs, alternating text-image sections
patterns.template:
Powerful Features

Description of the feature and its benefits

Learn More

patterns.name: FAQ Section
patterns.description: Two-column layout with heading on left and accordion items on right
patterns.usage: FAQ pages, help sections, common questions
patterns.template:
Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know

Scale is a design system... npm install @scale/design-system Yes, Scale is open source

patterns.name: Pricing Section
patterns.description: 3-column pricing grid with heading and plan cards
patterns.usage: Pricing pages, plan comparison, subscription tiers
patterns.template:
Simple Pricing

Choose the plan that works for you

Free For individuals 1 project Basic support Get Started Popular Pro For growing teams Unlimited projects Priority support Get Started Enterprise For organizations Everything in Pro SSO & SAML Contact Sales

patterns.name: Bento Grid Section
patterns.usage: Feature showcases, product highlights, portfolio displays
patterns.template:
Features

Everything you need to build great products

Feature One Description Feature Two Description Feature Three Description Feature Four Description

patterns.name: Signup Section
patterns.description: Card-based email capture with heading, input, and CTA
patterns.usage: Email capture sections, newsletter signup, call-to-action blocks
patterns.template:
Stay Updated

Get the latest news and product updates

Subscribe

patterns.name: Content Section
patterns.description: Simple centered or left-aligned text section
patterns.usage: Text-only sections, section headers, standalone content blocks
patterns.template:
Section Title

Supporting description text

patterns.name: Form Card
patterns.description: Card with form fields, help text, and submit button
patterns.usage: Login forms, registration cards, contact forms
patterns.template: Sign In Enter your credentials Sign In

patterns.name: Page Header
patterns.description: Fixed navigation bar with logo, nav links, theme toggle, and CTAs
patterns.template:
<sc-header
  nav-align="center"
  primary-label="Get Started"
  primary-href="/signup"
  secondary-label="Log In"
  secondary-href="/login"
  :nav-links='[{"label":"Features","href":"#features"},{"label":"Pricing","href":"#pricing"},{"label":"Docs","href":"/docs"}]'>
</sc-header>

patterns.name: Page Footer
patterns.description: Site footer with brand logo, copyright, and licence link
patterns.usage: Page footers, bottom of marketing sites
patterns.template:
<sc-footer
  copyright="©2026 Scale. All rights reserved."
  licence-label="Terms of Service"
  licence-href="/terms">
</sc-footer>

patterns.name: Status Badge Row
patterns.description: List of items with status badges and icons
patterns.usage: Feature lists, status displays, plan features
patterns.template:
<sc-row leading-icon="check">Unlimited projects</sc-row>
<sc-row leading-icon="check">Priority support</sc-row>
<sc-row leading-icon="x" disabled>Custom domain</sc-row>

patterns.name: Settings Toggle
patterns.description: On/off toggle with label and help text
patterns.usage: Settings pages, feature flags, preference controls
patterns.template: Enable notifications
